---
title: "Reynolds Dataset Analysis"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
source("utils.R")
```

## Configuration

Set the path to the data and specify the genes you want to analyze.

```{r parameters}
# Path to the directory containing 10X files and obs.tsv
# Defaulting to the original location, but can be updated.
data_dir <- "."

# List of genes to visualize
target_genes <- c("SEMA3A", "FGL2", "MARCO") 

# Metadata column for grouping
grouping_var <- "full_clustering"
```

## Data Loading and Preprocessing

```{r processing, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Load data
seu <- load_reynolds_data(data_dir)

# Run standard pipeline
seu <- preprocess_seurat(seu)

# Save the processed object
saveRDS(seu, file = "reynolds_processed.rds")
```

## Dimensionality Reduction Plots

```{r dim_plots}
plot_dim_red(seu, "umap")
plot_dim_red(seu, "tsne")
```

## Gene Expression Visualization

```{r violin_plots}
for (gene in target_genes) {
  p <- plot_gene_expression(seu, gene = gene, group_by = grouping_var)
  if (!is.null(p)) {
    print(p)
  }
}
```
